creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dnia 2011-10-02, o godz. 11:19:28
Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com> napisa=B3(a):

>The version of libusb for FreeBSD < 8 is libusb-0.1x, which does not
>meet the requirement of the new version. So should we just mark it
>ignore for FreeBSD < 8?

Yes, I think it can be safely marked IGNORE for < 8. Only 2 ports
depend on it:

security/fprint_demo
security/pam_fprint

and the are not that important.

--=20
pozdrawiam / with regards
Pawe=B3 P=EAkala
